---
title: "Threshold_model"
author: "Martin-Junior ADECHI"
date: "2026-04-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Fonctions spĂŠciales
```{r}
library(pracma)
# =========================
# Fonction eta (stable)
# =========================
eta <- function(r, alpha){
  -tan(pi*alpha/2) * r^alpha   # r > 0 donc sign(r)=1
}

# =========================
# IntĂŠgrale gĂŠnĂŠrique (robuste)
# =========================
core_integral <- function(x, d, alpha, beta, trig = "cos", log_term = FALSE, corrected = FALSE){

  # Fonction scalaire pour un seul t
  scalar_integrand <- function(t){
    # seuil critique
    if(t < 1e-8){
      power <- (d + 2)/alpha - 1
      return(-0.5 * x^2 * (1/alpha) * t^power)
    }
    
    # Changement de variable
    r <- t^(1/alpha)
    dr_dt <- (1/alpha) * t^(1/alpha - 1)
    
    # Angle
    angle <- x * r + beta * eta(r, alpha)
    if(!is.finite(angle)){
      angle <- 0
    } else {
      angle <- angle %% (2*pi)
    }
    
    # Partie trigonomĂŠtrique
    trig_part <- if(trig == "cos") cos(angle) else sin(angle)
    
    # Correction pour d <= 0
    if(corrected){
      if(trig == "cos"){
        trig_part <- trig_part - 1
      } else {
        trig_part <- trig_part - x * r
      }
    }
    
    # Terme logarithmique
    if(log_term){
      trig_part <- trig_part * log(r)
    }
    
    # IntĂŠgrande final
    val <- trig_part * r^(d-1) * exp(-t) * dr_dt
    
    return(val)
  }
  
  integrate(Vectorize(scalar_integrand), lower = 0, upper = Inf, subdivisions = 2000)$value
  # capture.output(
  #   res <- pracma::integral(Vectorize(scalar_integrand), 0, Inf)
  # )
  # res
}

# =========================
# Wrappers propres
# =========================

# g_d
g_d <- function(x, d, alpha, beta){
  if(d > 0){
    core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="cos")
  } else {
    core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="cos", corrected=TRUE)
  }
}

# g_d tilde
g_d_tilde <- function(x, d, alpha, beta){
  if(d > -min(1, alpha)){
    core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="sin")
  } else {
    core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="sin", corrected=TRUE)
  }
}

# h_d (log cos)
h_d <- function(x, d, alpha, beta){
  core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="cos", log_term=TRUE)
}

# h_d tilde (log sin)
h_d_tilde <- function(x, d, alpha, beta){
  core_integral(x, d, alpha, beta, trig="sin", log_term=TRUE)
}

# =========================
# Vectorisation
# =========================
g_d        <- Vectorize(g_d)
g_d_tilde  <- Vectorize(g_d_tilde)
h_d        <- Vectorize(h_d)
h_d_tilde  <- Vectorize(h_d_tilde)

```




```{r}
# =========================================
# Librairies nĂŠcessaires
# =========================================
library(stabledist)  # pour rstable, qstable, dstable, pstable

# =========================================
# ParamĂ¨tres vrais du stable
# =========================================
alpha_true <- 1.5
beta_true  <- 0
gamma_true <- 1
zeta_true  <- 0

# ParamĂ¨tres du modĂ¨le spliced
lambda <- 0.2      
m <- 10 
p <- 0.2
n <- 5e4     # taille de l'ĂŠchantillon

# -------------------------
# Topp-Leone Exponential
fB <- function(x) {
  2*m*lambda*exp(-2*lambda*x) * (1 - exp(-2*lambda*x))^(m-1)
}

FB <- function(x) {
  (1 - exp(-2*lambda*x))^m
}

qB <- function(u) {
  - (1 / (2*lambda)) * log(1 - u^(1/m))
}

# Partie haute : Stable param 0
fT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) dstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
FT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) pstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
qT <- function(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) qstable(u, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)

# =========================================
# Fonctions utilitaires
# =========================================

# Fonction de superquantile empirique
superquantile_emp <- function(x, p){
  q <- quantile(x, probs = p)
  mean(x[x > q])
}

# Simulation d'un ĂŠchantillon du modĂ¨le spliced
simulate_spliced <- function(n, p,m,lambda,
                             alpha, beta, gamma, zeta){
  
  # Seuil continuitĂŠ
  g <- function(u) (p*fB(u)/FB(u)) - 
    ((1-p)*fT(u,alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true)/(1-FT(u, alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true)))
  uc <- uniroot(g, lower=0.01, upper=20)$root
  
  # U0 pour choisir body/tail
  U0 <- runif(n)
  U1 <- runif(n)
  X <- numeric(n)
  
    for(i in 1:n){
    if(U0[i] <= p){
      X[i] <- qB(U1[i]*FB(uc))
    } else{
      v <- FT(uc, alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true) + U1[i]*(1-FT(uc, alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true))
      X[i] <- qT(v, alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true)
    }
  }
    
  return(X)
}

# =========================================
# Fonction objectif pour l'optimisation
# =========================================
# Nous cherchons (alpha,beta,gamma,zeta) qui minimisent l'ĂŠcart entre SQ-Q et
# la formule thĂŠorique H(Q, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)
objective_function <- function(params, Qs, SQs){
  alpha <- params[1]
  beta  <- params[2]
  gamma <- params[3]
  zeta  <- params[4]
  
  # On ĂŠvite alpha <= 0 pour stabilitĂŠ
  if(alpha <= 0 || gamma <= 0 || abs(beta) > 1) return(1e10)

  # ĂŠviter singularitĂŠs
  if(abs(alpha - 1) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
  
  # ĂŠviter gamma poles
  if(abs(1/alpha - round(1/alpha)) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
  
  err <- 0
  for(i in 1:length(Qs)){
    Q <- Qs[i]
    P_T_Q <- pstable(Q, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0, lower.tail = FALSE)
    z = (Q - zeta + beta*gamma*tan(pi*alpha/2))/gamma
    # H(Q,alpha,beta,gamma,zeta) 
    H_val <- (zeta - beta * gamma * tan(pi*alpha/2)-Q) / (2*P_T_Q) + (gamma/(pi*P_T_Q)) * (gamma(1 - 1/alpha) - g_d(x=z, d=-1, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
    # erreur
    err <- err + (SQs[i] - Q - H_val)^2
  }
  
  return(err)
}

# =========================================
# Simulation
# =========================================
set.seed(123)
X <- simulate_spliced(n, p, m,lambda,
                      alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true)

# Niveaux de probabilitĂŠ
prob_levels <- c(0.5, 0.55, 0.52, 0.45)

# Quantiles et superquantiles empiriques
Q_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) quantile(X, p))
SQ_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) superquantile_emp(X, p))

# =========================================
# Optimisation numĂŠrique
# =========================================
# Initialisation
init_params <- c(alpha=1.2, beta=0, gamma=1, zeta=0)

res <- optim(par = init_params,
             fn = objective_function,
             Qs = Q_hat,
             SQs = SQ_hat,
             method = "L-BFGS-B",
             lower = c(0.01, -1, 0.01, -Inf),
             upper = c(2, 1, 5, Inf))

# ParamĂ¨tres estimĂŠs
alpha_hat <- res$par[1]
beta_hat  <- res$par[2]
gamma_hat <- res$par[3]
zeta_hat <- res$par[4]

cat("ParamĂ¨tres vrais : ", alpha_true, beta_true, gamma_true, zeta_true, "\n")
cat("ParamĂ¨tres estimĂŠs : ", alpha_hat, beta_hat, gamma_hat, zeta_hat, "\n")
```


```{r}
library(statmod)
g_minus_1 <- function(x,alpha, beta){
  scalar_integrand <- function(t){
    r <- t^(1/alpha)
    dr_dt <- (1/alpha) * t^(1/alpha - 1)
    
    trig_part <- cos(x*r - tan(pi*alpha/2)*beta*r^alpha) - 1
    
    val <- trig_part * r^(-2) * dr_dt
    
    return(val)
  }
  
  n <- 200
  gl <- statmod::gauss.quad(n, kind = "laguerre",alpha = 0)
  t <- gl$nodes
  w <- gl$weights

  sum(w * sapply(t, scalar_integrand))  
}
```



```{r}
library(stabledist) 
# Topp-Leone Exponential
fB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  m*lambda*exp(-lambda*x) * (1 - exp(-lambda*x))^(m-1)
}

FB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  (1 - exp(-lambda*x))^m
}

qB <- function(u,m,lambda) {
  - (1 / (lambda)) * log(1 - u^(1/m))
}

# Partie haute : Stable param 0
fT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) dstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
FT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) pstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
qT <- function(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) qstable(u, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)

simulate_spliced <- function(n, params){
  p = params[1]
  m = params[2]
  lambda = params[3]
  alpha = params[4]
  beta = params[5]
  gamma = params[6]
  zeta = params[7]
  # Seuil continuitĂŠ
  g <- function(u) (p*fB(u,m,lambda)/FB(u,m,lambda)) - 
    ((1-p)*fT(u,alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)/(1-FT(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)))
  uc <- uniroot(g, lower=0.01, upper=20)$root
  
  # U0 pour choisir body/tail
  U0 <- runif(n)
  U1 <- runif(n)
  X <- numeric(n)
  
    for(i in 1:n){
    if(U0[i] <= p){
      X[i] <- qB(U1[i]*FB(uc,m,lambda),m,lambda)
    } else{
      v <- FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) + U1[i]*(1-FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta))
      X[i] <- qT(v, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)
    }
  }
    
  return(X)
}

# Fonction de superquantile empirique
superquantile_emp <- function(x, p){
  q <- quantile(x, probs = p)
  mean(x[x > q])
} 

quantile_superquantile_estim <- function(Qs, SQs){
  
    objective_function <- function(params, Qs, SQs){
      alpha <- params[1]
      beta  <- params[2]
      gamma <- params[3]
      zeta  <- params[4]
      
      # On ĂŠvite alpha <= 0 pour stabilitĂŠ
      if(alpha <= 0 || gamma <= 0 || abs(beta) > 1) return(1e10)
    
      # ĂŠviter singularitĂŠs
      if(abs(alpha - 1) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
      
      # ĂŠviter gamma poles
      if(abs(1/alpha - round(1/alpha)) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
  
      
      err <- 0
      for(i in 1:length(Qs)){
        Q <- Qs[i]
        suppressWarnings(
          P_T_Q <- pstable(Q, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0, lower.tail = FALSE)
        )
        
        z = (Q - zeta + beta*gamma*tan(pi*alpha/2))/gamma
        # H(Q,alpha,beta,gamma,zeta)
        H_val <- (zeta - beta * gamma * tan(pi*alpha/2)-Q) / (2*P_T_Q) + (gamma/(pi*P_T_Q)) * (gamma(1 - 1/alpha) - g_minus_1(x=z, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
        # erreur
        err <- err + (SQs[i] - Q - H_val)^2

        
      }
      if (any(!is.finite(err))) return(1e10)
      
      return(err)
    }
    
    init_params <- c(alpha=1.2, beta=0, gamma=1, zeta=0)

    res <- optim(par = init_params,
             fn = objective_function,
             Qs = Qs,
             SQs = SQs,
             method = "L-BFGS-B",
             lower = c(1.01, -1, 0.01, -Inf),
             upper = c(2, 1, 10, Inf))

    return(res$par)
}


simulation <- function(n, true_params, replications=50, prob_levels){
  # params is the true parameters of stable component
  results <- matrix(NA, nrow = replications, ncol = 4)
  
  for (i in 1:replications) {
    sample <-simulate_spliced(n, c(0.2, 10, 0.2, true_params))
    Q_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) quantile(sample, p))
    SQ_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) superquantile_emp(sample, p))
    
    estimation <- quantile_superquantile_estim(Q_hat, SQ_hat)
    if (!is.null(estimation)) {
      results[i, ] <- estimation
    }
    else results[i, ] <- c(NA,NA,NA,NA,NA,NA)
  }
  colnames(results) <- c( "alpha","beta","gamma" , "delta")
  # Calcul des mĂŠtriques
 
  true_matrix <- matrix(rep(true_params, each = replications), nrow = replications)
  
  mean_estimates <- colMeans(results, na.rm = TRUE)
  biases <- abs(mean_estimates - true_params)
  mse <- colMeans((results - true_matrix)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
  variances <- apply(results, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(data.frame(Mean_Estimate = mean_estimates,
                    Bias = biases,
                    MSE = mse,
                    Variance = variances))
  
}

```

## Estimation paramĂ¨tres

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21 <- simulation(250,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_22 <- simulation(1e3,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))

print(sim_result_21)
print(sim_result_22)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_11 <- simulation(250,true_params=params[1,],prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
                             
sim_result_12 <- simulation(1e3,true_params=params[1,],prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))

print(sim_result_11)
print(sim_result_12)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21_v2 <- simulation(250,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
sim_result_22_v2 <- simulation(1e3,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))

print(sim_result_21_v2)
print(sim_result_22_v2)
```


```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_11_v2 <- simulation(250,true_params=params[1,],prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
                             
sim_result_12_v2 <- simulation(1e3,true_params=params[1,],prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))

print(sim_result_11_v2)
print(sim_result_12_v2)
```


## Lemme 3.2 estimation

```{r}
library(stabledist)

# ================================================================
# FONCTIONS DE BASE
# ================================================================
fB <- function(x, m, theta)
  m * theta * exp(-theta*x) * (1 - exp(-theta*x))^(m-1)
FB <- function(x, m, theta)
  (1 - exp(-theta*x))^m
qB <- function(u, m, theta)
  -(1/theta) * log(1 - u^(1/m))
fT <- function(x, al, be, ga, ze)
  dstable(x, alpha=al, beta=be, gamma=ga, delta=ze, pm=0)
FT <- function(x, al, be, ga, ze)
  pstable(x, alpha=al, beta=be, gamma=ga, delta=ze, pm=0)

simulate_spliced <- function(n, params) {
  p=params[1]; m=params[2]; theta=params[3]
  al=params[4]; be=params[5]; ga=params[6]; ze=params[7]
  g <- function(u){
    hB <- fB(u,m,theta)/FB(u,m,theta) 
    hT <- fT(u,al,be,ga,ze)/(1-FT(u,al,be,ga,ze))
    hB_safe <- ifelse(is.nan(hB),0,hB)
    p* hB_safe - (1-p)*hT
  }
    
  mode_B <- if(m > 1) log(m)/theta else 1/theta
  upper_u <- max(50, mode_B * 20, ze)
  uc <- uniroot(g, lower=0.01, upper=upper_u, tol=1e-10)$root
  U0 <- runif(n); U1 <- runif(n); X <- numeric(n)
  for(i in 1:n) {
    if(U0[i] <= p) {
      X[i] <- qB(U1[i]*FB(uc,m,theta), m, theta)
    } else {
      v    <- FT(uc,al,be,ga,ze) + U1[i]*(1-FT(uc,al,be,ga,ze))
      X[i] <- qstable(v, alpha=al, beta=be, gamma=ga, delta=ze, pm=0)
    }
  }
  X
}

# ================================================================
# ĂTAPE 1 : IM_q par intĂŠgration numĂŠrique (stable pour tout m,Î¸)
# ================================================================
IM_q_numint <- function(Qp, m, theta, q) {
  if(Qp <= 0 || !is.finite(Qp)) return(NA_real_)
  integrand <- function(x) {
    vals <- x^q * fB(x, m, theta)
    vals[!is.finite(vals)] <- 0
    vals
  }
  lower_lim <- if(m < 1) 1e-10 else 0
  tryCatch({
    num   <- integrate(integrand, lower=lower_lim, upper=Qp,
                       subdivisions=500, rel.tol=1e-6)$value
    denom <- FB(Qp, m, theta)
    if(!is.finite(num) || denom < 1e-300) NA_real_ else num/denom
  }, error=function(e) NA_real_)
}

# ================================================================
# ĂTAPE 2 : Estimation (m,Î¸) par matching des IM
#           sur observations corps uniquement
# ================================================================
incomplete_moment_estim <- function(x_body,
                                       q_values = c(0.5, 1, 1.5, 2),
                                       prob_body = seq(0.1, 0.9, by=0.1),
                                       init_pars = NULL,
                                       verbose   = FALSE) {
  
  # Quantiles des observations corps directement
  Q_body_emp <- as.numeric(quantile(x_body, probs=prob_body))
  
  # Moments incomplets empiriques sur observations corps
  # E_emp[B^q | B â¤ Q_p^body] = mean(x_body[x_body â¤ Q_p]^q)
  Imq_emp <- unlist(lapply(q_values, function(q)
    sapply(Q_body_emp, function(Q)
      mean(x_body[x_body <= Q]^q)
    )
  ))
  
  # VĂŠrification dimensions
  expected <- length(q_values) * length(Q_body_emp)
  stopifnot(length(Imq_emp) == expected)
  
  # Objectif : erreur relative au carrĂŠ (invariance d'ĂŠchelle)
  objective <- function(pars) {
    m_    <- pars[1]; theta_ <- pars[2]
    if(m_ <= 0 || theta_ <= 0) return(1e10)
    
    err <- 0; idx <- 1
    for(q in q_values) {
      for(Q in Q_body_emp) {
        th_val  <- IM_q_numint(Q, m_, theta_, q)
        emp_val <- Imq_emp[idx]
        if(!is.na(th_val) && is.finite(th_val) &&
           is.finite(emp_val) && abs(emp_val) > 1e-300) {
          err <- err + ((emp_val - th_val) / emp_val)^2
        }
        idx <- idx + 1
      }
    }
    if(!is.finite(err)) 1e10 else err
  }
  
  # Init data-driven si non fournie
  if(is.null(init_pars))
    init_pars <- c(2,1.5)
  
  if(verbose)
    cat(sprintf("Init IM-matching : m=%.3f, theta=%.6f\n",
                init_pars["m"], init_pars["theta"]))
  
  opt <- tryCatch(
    optim(init_pars, objective, method="L-BFGS-B",
          lower=c(0.01, 1e-7), upper=c(Inf, Inf),
          control=list(maxit=2000, factr=1e5, pgtol=1e-9)),
    error=function(e) list(par=init_pars, value=Inf)
  )
  
  names(opt$par) <- c("m","theta")
  opt$par
}

# ================================================================
# FONCTION PRINCIPALE D'INITIALISATION CORPS
# ================================================================
init_body <- function(x, p_init, verbose=TRUE) {
  
  x_body <- sort(x[x <= quantile(x, p_init)])
  
  theta_B <- incomplete_moment_estim(
    x_body  = x_body,
    q_values = c(0.5, 1, 1.5, 2),
    prob_body = seq(0.1, 0.9, by=0.1),
    verbose  = verbose
  )
  
  if(verbose)
    cat(sprintf("RĂŠsultat : m=%.4f, theta=%.6f\n",
                theta_B["m"], theta_B["theta"]))
  theta_B
}

# ================================================================
# SIMULATION DE MONTE CARLO
# ================================================================
Bsimulation <- function(n, true_params, replications=50,
                           p_init=0.2, verbose=FALSE) {
  results  <- matrix(NA, nrow=replications, ncol=2)
  colnames(results) <- c("m","theta")
  
  for(i in 1:replications) {
    sim_i <- tryCatch(
      simulate_spliced(n, c(p_init, true_params, 1.5, 0.5, 1,100)),
      error=function(e) list(X=rep(NA,n))
    )
    if(all(is.na(sim_i))) next
    
    est <- tryCatch(
      init_body(sim_i, p_init, verbose=verbose),
      error=function(e) c(m=NA, theta=NA)
    )
    results[i,] <- est
    
    if(verbose && i %% 10 == 0)
      cat(sprintf("  Rep %3d/%d : m=%.3f (vrai=%.3f), theta=%.5f (vrai=%.5f)\n",
                  i, replications, est["m"], true_params[1],
                  est["theta"], true_params[2]))
  }
  
  true_mat <- matrix(rep(true_params, each=replications), nrow=replications)
  m_est    <- colMeans(results, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    Vraie_val    = true_params,
    Moy_est      = round(m_est, 5),
    Biais    = round(abs(m_est - true_params), 5),
    MSE          = round(colMeans((results-true_mat)^2, na.rm=TRUE), 7),
    Variance     = round(apply(results, 2, var, na.rm=TRUE), 7),
    n_valid      = c(sum(!is.na(results[,1])), sum(!is.na(results[,2])))
  )
}
```


```{r}
params_body = matrix(c(10, 0.7, 2, 1.2), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_b21 <- Bsimulation(1e3,true_params=params_body[2,])
print(sim_result_b21)
```
```{r}
params_body = matrix(c(10, 0.7, 2, 1.2), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_b22 <- Bsimulation(2e3,true_params=params_body[2,])
print(sim_result_b22)
```


```{r}
params_body = matrix(c(10, 0.7, 2, 1.2), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_b11 <- Bsimulation(1e3,true_params=params_body[1,])
print(sim_result_b11)
```

```{r}
params_body = matrix(c(10,0.7, 2, 1.2), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_b12 <- Bsimulation(2e3,true_params=params_body[1,])
print(sim_result_b12)
```




## Lemme 3.1 (Subgradient Descent for Empirical Superquantile Estimation & Smoothed Superquantile Optimization)

```{r}
library(stabledist)
library(statmod)
g_minus_1 <- function(x,alpha, beta){
  scalar_integrand <- function(t){
    # Changement de variable
    r <- t^(1/alpha)
    dr_dt <- (1/alpha) * t^(1/alpha - 1)
    
    trig_part <- cos(x*r - tan(pi*alpha/2)*beta*r^alpha) - 1
    
    val <- trig_part * r^(-2) * dr_dt
    
    return(val)
  }
  
  n <- 200
  gl <- statmod::gauss.quad(n, kind = "laguerre",alpha = 0)
  t <- gl$nodes
  w <- gl$weights

  sum(w * sapply(t, scalar_integrand))  
}
# Topp-Leone Exponential
fB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  2*m*lambda*exp(-2*lambda*x) * (1 - exp(-2*lambda*x))^(m-1)
}

FB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  (1 - exp(-2*lambda*x))^m
}

qB <- function(u,m,lambda) {
  - (1 / (2*lambda)) * log(1 - u^(1/m))
}

# Partie haute : Stable param 0
fT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) dstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
FT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) pstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
qT <- function(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) qstable(u, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)

simulate_spliced <- function(n, params){
  p = params[1]
  m = params[2]
  lambda = params[3]
  alpha = params[4]
  beta = params[5]
  gamma = params[6]
  zeta = params[7]
  # Seuil continuitĂŠ
  g <- function(u) (p*fB(u,m,lambda)/FB(u,m,lambda)) - 
    ((1-p)*fT(u,alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)/(1-FT(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)))
  uc <- uniroot(g, lower=0.01, upper=20)$root
  
  # U0 pour choisir body/tail
  U0 <- runif(n)
  U1 <- runif(n)
  X <- numeric(n)
  
    for(i in 1:n){
    if(U0[i] <= p){
      X[i] <- qB(U1[i]*FB(uc,m,lambda),m,lambda)
    } else{
      v <- FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) + U1[i]*(1-FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta))
      X[i] <- qT(v, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)
    }
  }
    
  return(X)
}

# Fonction de superquantile empirique
superquantile_subgradient <- function(x, p,learning_rate, Tmax=500, epsilon = 1e-6){
  n = length(x)
  eta_t = numeric(Tmax + 1)
  eta_t[1] = median(x) # initial quantile
  ind <- function(x,seuil) ifelse(x > seuil, 1, 0)
  for (t in 1:Tmax) {
    F_bar_hat = sum(sapply(x, ind, eta_t[t]))/n
    gt <- 1-(1/(1-p))* F_bar_hat    # the subgradient
    eta_t[t+1] <- eta_t[t] - (learning_rate/sqrt(t))*gt
    if(abs(eta_t[t+1] - eta_t[t]) < epsilon) break
  }
  eta_hat <- eta_t[t+1]
  SQ_p <- eta_hat + sum(pmax(x - eta_hat, 0))/((1-p)*n)
  return(SQ_p)
} 

quantile_superquantile_estim <- function(Qs, SQs){
  
    objective_function <- function(params, Qs, SQs){
      alpha <- params[1]
      beta  <- params[2]
      gamma <- params[3]
      zeta  <- params[4]
      
      # On ĂŠvite alpha <= 0 pour stabilitĂŠ
      if(alpha <= 0 || gamma <= 0 || abs(beta) > 1) return(1e10)
    
      # ĂŠviter singularitĂŠs
      if(abs(alpha - 1) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
      
      # ĂŠviter gamma poles
      if(abs(1/alpha - round(1/alpha)) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
  
      
      err <- 0
      for(i in 1:length(Qs)){
        Q <- Qs[i]
        suppressWarnings(
          P_T_Q <- pstable(Q, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0, lower.tail = FALSE)
        )
        
        z = (Q - zeta + beta*gamma*tan(pi*alpha/2))/gamma
        # H(Q,alpha,beta,gamma,zeta)
        H_val <- (zeta - beta * gamma * tan(pi*alpha/2)-Q) / (2*P_T_Q) + (gamma/(pi*P_T_Q)) * (gamma(1 - 1/alpha) - g_minus_1(x=z, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
        # erreur
        err <- err + (SQs[i] - Q - H_val)^2

        
      }
      if (any(!is.finite(err))) return(1e10)
      
      return(err)
    }
    
    init_params <- c(alpha=1.2, beta=0, gamma=1, zeta=0)

    res <- optim(par = init_params,
             fn = objective_function,
             Qs = Qs,
             SQs = SQs,
             method = "L-BFGS-B",
             lower = c(1.01, -1, 0.01, -Inf),
             upper = c(2, 1, 10, Inf))

    return(res$par)
}


simulation_2 <- function(n, true_params, replications=50, prob_levels){
  # params is the true parameters of stable component
  results <- matrix(NA, nrow = replications, ncol = 4)
  
  for (i in 1:replications) {
    sample <-simulate_spliced(n, c(0.2, 10, 0.2, true_params))
    Q_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) quantile(sample, p))
    SQ_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) superquantile_subgradient(sample,p,learning_rate = 0.05))
    
    estimation <- quantile_superquantile_estim(Q_hat, SQ_hat)
    if (!is.null(estimation)) {
      results[i, ] <- estimation
    }
    else results[i, ] <- c(NA,NA,NA,NA,NA,NA)
  }
  colnames(results) <- c( "alpha","beta","gamma" , "delta")
  # Calcul des mĂŠtriques
 
  true_matrix <- matrix(rep(true_params, each = replications), nrow = replications)
  
  mean_estimates <- colMeans(results, na.rm = TRUE)
  biases <- abs(mean_estimates - true_params)
  mse <- colMeans((results - true_matrix)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
  variances <- apply(results, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(data.frame(Mean_Estimate = mean_estimates,
                    Bias = biases,
                    MSE = mse,
                    Variance = variances))
  
}
```

## Estimation des paramĂ¨tres: subgradient learning

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21 <- simulation_2(250,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_22 <- simulation_2(1e3,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
print(sim_result_21)
print(sim_result_22)
```


```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_11 <- simulation_2(250,true_params=params[1,],  prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_12 <- simulation_2(1e3,true_params=params[1,],  prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
print(sim_result_11)
print(sim_result_12)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21_v2 <- simulation_2(250,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
sim_result_22_v2 <- simulation_2(1e3,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_21_v2)
print(sim_result_22_v2)
```
```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_11_v2 <- simulation_2(250,true_params=params[1,],  prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
sim_result_12_v2 <- simulation_2(1e3,true_params=params[1,],  prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_11_v2)
print(sim_result_12_v2)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21_v2 <- simulation_2(250,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
sim_result_22_v2 <- simulation_2(1e3,true_params=params[2,], prob_levels = c(0.45,0.50,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_21_v2)
print(sim_result_22_v2)
```



## Lemme 3.1 (Smoothed Superquantile Optimization)

```{r}
library(stabledist)
library(statmod)
g_minus_1 <- function(x,alpha, beta){
  scalar_integrand <- function(t){
    # Changement de variable
    r <- t^(1/alpha)
    dr_dt <- (1/alpha) * t^(1/alpha - 1)
    
    trig_part <- cos(x*r - tan(pi*alpha/2)*beta*r^alpha) - 1
    
    val <- trig_part * r^(-2) * dr_dt
    
    return(val)
  }
  
  n <- 200
  gl <- statmod::gauss.quad(n, kind = "laguerre",alpha = 0)
  t <- gl$nodes
  w <- gl$weights

  sum(w * sapply(t, scalar_integrand))  
}
# Topp-Leone Exponential
fB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  m*lambda*exp(-lambda*x) * (1 - exp(-lambda*x))^(m-1)
}

FB <- function(x,m,lambda) {
  (1 - exp(-lambda*x))^m
}

qB <- function(u,m,lambda) {
  - (1 / (lambda)) * log(1 - u^(1/m))
}

# Partie haute : Stable param 0
fT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) dstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
FT <- function(x, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) pstable(x, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)
qT <- function(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) qstable(u, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0)

simulate_spliced <- function(n, params){
  p = params[1]
  m = params[2]
  lambda = params[3]
  alpha = params[4]
  beta = params[5]
  gamma = params[6]
  zeta = params[7]
  # Seuil continuitĂŠ
  g <- function(u) (p*fB(u,m,lambda)/FB(u,m,lambda)) - 
    ((1-p)*fT(u,alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)/(1-FT(u, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)))
  uc <- uniroot(g, lower=0.01, upper=20)$root
  
  # U0 pour choisir body/tail
  U0 <- runif(n)
  U1 <- runif(n)
  X <- numeric(n)
  
    for(i in 1:n){
    if(U0[i] <= p){
      X[i] <- qB(U1[i]*FB(uc,m,lambda),m,lambda)
    } else{
      v <- FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta) + U1[i]*(1-FT(uc, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta))
      X[i] <- qT(v, alpha, beta, gamma, zeta)
    }
  }
    
  return(X)
}

# Fonction de superquantile empirique
superquantile_smooth <- function(X, p, mu=0.1){
  n <- length(X)
  losses <- X
  upper_bound <- 1/(n*(1-p))
  
  dual_constraint <- function(eta){
    q <- pmin(pmax((losses - eta)/mu + 1/n, 0), upper_bound)
    sum(q) - 1
  }
  
  eta_star <- tryCatch({
    uniroot(dual_constraint, lower=min(losses)-mu, upper=max(losses)+mu)$root
  }, error=function(e) quantile(losses, p))
  
  q_star <- pmin(pmax((losses - eta_star)/mu + 1/n, 0), upper_bound)
  SQ_smooth <- sum(q_star * losses)
  return(SQ_smooth)
}

quantile_superquantile_estim <- function(Qs, SQs){
  
    objective_function <- function(params, Qs, SQs){
      alpha <- params[1]
      beta  <- params[2]
      gamma <- params[3]
      zeta  <- params[4]
      
      # On ĂŠvite alpha <= 0 pour stabilitĂŠ
      if(alpha <= 0 || gamma <= 0 || abs(beta) > 1) return(1e10)
    
      # ĂŠviter singularitĂŠs
      if(abs(alpha - 1) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
      
      # ĂŠviter gamma poles
      if(abs(1/alpha - round(1/alpha)) < 1e-2) return(1e10)
  
      
      err <- 0
      for(i in 1:length(Qs)){
        Q <- Qs[i]
        suppressWarnings(
          P_T_Q <- pstable(Q, alpha=alpha, beta=beta, gamma=gamma, delta=zeta, pm=0, lower.tail = FALSE)
        )
        
        z = (Q - zeta + beta*gamma*tan(pi*alpha/2))/gamma
        # H(Q,alpha,beta,gamma,zeta)
        # H_val <- (zeta - beta * gamma * tan(pi*alpha/2)-Q) / (2*P_T_Q) + (gamma/(pi*P_T_Q)) * (gamma(1 - 1/alpha) - g_d(x=z, d=-1, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
        H_val <- (zeta - beta * gamma * tan(pi*alpha/2)-Q) / (2*P_T_Q) + (gamma/(pi*P_T_Q)) * (gamma(1 - 1/alpha) - g_minus_1(x=z, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
        # erreur
        err <- err + (SQs[i] - Q - H_val)^2

        
      }
      if (any(!is.finite(err))) return(1e10)
      
      return(err)
    }
    
    init_params <- c(alpha=1.2, beta=0, gamma=1, zeta=0)

    res <- optim(par = init_params,
             fn = objective_function,
             Qs = Qs,
             SQs = SQs,
             method = "L-BFGS-B",
             lower = c(1.01, -1, 0.01, -Inf),
             upper = c(2, 1, 10, Inf))

    return(res$par)
}


simulation_3 <- function(n, true_params, replications=50,prob_levels = c(0.05,0.25,0.75,0.95)){
  # params is the true parameters of stable component
  results <- matrix(NA, nrow = replications, ncol = 4)
  
  for (i in 1:replications) {
    sample <-simulate_spliced(n, c(0.2, 10, 0.2, true_params))
    Q_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) quantile(sample, p))
    SQ_hat <- sapply(prob_levels, function(p) superquantile_smooth(sample,p))
    
    estimation <- quantile_superquantile_estim(Q_hat, SQ_hat)
    if (!is.null(estimation)) {
      results[i, ] <- estimation
    }
    else results[i, ] <- c(NA,NA,NA,NA,NA,NA)
  }
  colnames(results) <- c( "alpha","beta","gamma" , "delta")
  # Calcul des mĂŠtriques
 
  true_matrix <- matrix(rep(true_params, each = replications), nrow = replications)
  
  mean_estimates <- colMeans(results, na.rm = TRUE)
  biases <- abs(mean_estimates - true_params)
  mse <- colMeans((results - true_matrix)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
  variances <- apply(results, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(data.frame(Mean_Estimate = mean_estimates,
                    Bias = biases,
                    MSE = mse,
                    Variance = variances))
  
}
```

## Estimations paramĂ¨tres  (smoothed superquantile)

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_11_v1 <- simulation_3(250,true_params=params[1,],
                               prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_11_v2 <- simulation_3(250,true_params=params[1,],
                               prob_levels = c(0.45,0.5,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_11_v1)
print(sim_result_11_v2)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_12_v1 <- simulation_3(1e3,true_params=params[1,],
                                prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_12_v2 <- simulation_3(1e3,true_params=params[1,],
                               prob_levels = c(0.45,0.5,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_12_v1)
print(sim_result_12_v2)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_22_v1 <- simulation_3(1e3,true_params=params[2,],
                                prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_22_v2 <- simulation_3(1e3,true_params=params[2,],
                               prob_levels = c(0.45,0.5,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_22_v1)
print(sim_result_22_v2)
```

```{r}
params = matrix(c(1.5,0,1,0,1.7,-0.5,4,10), nrow=2, byrow=T)
sim_result_21_v1 <- simulation_3(250,true_params=params[2,],
                               prob_levels = seq(0.2,0.9,.1))
sim_result_21_v2 <- simulation_3(250,true_params=params[2,],
                               prob_levels = c(0.45,0.5,0.55,0.52))
print(sim_result_21_v1)
print(sim_result_21_v2)
```
